title: Onboarding - Eula page - Privacy Policy link
scenario: Onboarding EULA page Privacy Policy link opens HP Privacy Policy page with close button instead of back button
steps: Launch Poly Studio Mobile app for the first time
On the EULA (End User License Agreement) page, locate and tap the 'Privacy Policy' link
Observe the web page that opens
expected: The user is directed to the HP Privacy Policy page (https://www.hp.com/us-en/privacy/privacy.html?jumpid=in_R11928_/us/en/corp/privacy-central/privacy-statements). The page displays a close button (X) in the upper right corner.
